patch.value: The package extension should depend only on the official public SDK export surface. The installed SDK currently exports both defineExtension and listAllFrontMatter, so no upstream pm-cli issue is required for this pass.
Use official pm SDK without local extension shims

Replace the package-local defineExtension identity shim and runtime SDK path fallback with direct imports from the supported @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk package, after verifying the installed SDK exports defineExtension and listAllFrontMatter.

- src/extension.ts imports defineExtension and listAllFrontMatter directly from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk.
- No private pm-cli internals or local SDK compatibility shim remains.
- TypeScript check and pm extension install smoke pass.
- No upstream pm-cli issue is opened because the required SDK exports are present.

patch.value: Replaced local extension SDK shim and runtime fallback with direct official @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk imports.

src/extension.ts now imports defineExtension and listAllFrontMatter directly from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk. The installed SDK export audit showed both exports are present, npm run check passed, npm run release:check passed, and no pm-cli GitHub issue was opened because no SDK defect remains.
The extension uses only the official pm SDK public surface and installs without runtime compatibility workarounds.
Official SDK compliance implemented and verified
